BackstoryDef.title: Stonecutter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in creating whimsical stone statues, as well as carving stone bricks.

BackstoryDef.title: Graphic designer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as an interior designer and models 3D objects in an urbanized world.

BackstoryDef.title: Producer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a director in a world torn apart by war, where you have to really try to surprise the audience.

BackstoryDef.title: Bionics doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working as an ordinary surgeon for a long time, but {PAWN_gender ? his : her} talent is noticed by high-ranking people. [PAWN_nameDef] receives a license to operate bionic.

BackstoryDef.title: Cosmonaut
BackstoryDef.description: Since childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] dreamed of becoming a cosmonaut, like many other children of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} world. Ultimately, [PAWN_nameDef]'s stubbornness helps {PAWN_gender ? him : her} achieve {PAWN_gender ? his : her} goal.

BackstoryDef.title: Cynologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves working with dogs, so [PAWN_nameDef] gladly got a job as a dog handler in the police department.

BackstoryDef.title: Biochemist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] understands chemistry very well, which helped {PAWN_gender ? him : her} get a prestigious job. [PAWN_nameDef] studies the biosphere of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} planet all day long.

BackstoryDef.title: Inquiry agent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working as a private detective for a long time in an industrial world full of corruption. Ultimately, [PAWN_nameDef] realizes that this is a profitable business.

BackstoryDef.title: Fighter pilot
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is fascinated by the sky and literally raves about it. In adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] enlists in the army to serve as a fighter pilot.

BackstoryDef.title: Bomber pilot
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is fascinated by the sky and literally raves about it. In adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] enlists in the army to serve as a bomber pilot.

BackstoryDef.title: Military journalist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is often under fire, but tirelessly continues {PAWN_gender ? his : her} work.

BackstoryDef.title: Chemist technologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in the testing of chemicals and the design of various devices.

BackstoryDef.title: Investigator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working for a long time as an investigator for particularly important cases in the police department of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} city.

BackstoryDef.title: Psychiatrist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works with people with serious mental illness.

BackstoryDef.title: Military psychologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working in the rear headquarters for a long time, treating and rehabilitating soldiers.

BackstoryDef.title: Military psychiatrist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works with shell-shocked soldiers, helping them rehabilitate behind the front lines.

BackstoryDef.title: Illustrator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] draws illustrations for children's books for an elderly writer.

BackstoryDef.title: Programmer developer
BackstoryDef.description: For many years [PAWN_nameDef] has been developing software for a large gaming company.

BackstoryDef.title: Landscape designer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is passionate about landscape design, working part-time on furnishing country houses for wealthy people.

BackstoryDef.title: Web designer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] practices design for websites of various companies. In the end, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} talent is revealed in all its glory.

BackstoryDef.title: Movie artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] acts in films, often making {PAWN_gender ? his : her} way to movie posters in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} industrialized world.

BackstoryDef.title: Interior designer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs furniture sets and home furnishings, earning big bucks.

BackstoryDef.title: Pathologist
BackstoryDef.description: Throughout [PAWN_nameDef]'s medical practice, [PAWN_nameDef] has performed multiple autopsies and analyzes for examinations.

BackstoryDef.title: Resuscitator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the doctor who makes the dead come to life. Many see {PAWN_gender ? his : her} profession as a real miracle.

BackstoryDef.title: Archaeologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is passionate about ancient history and connected {PAWN_gender ? his : her} profession with it. [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the excavation of ancient civilizations and cities.

BackstoryDef.title: Sound engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in sound tuning for filming movies or feature films.

BackstoryDef.title: Geneticist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]He lives in an underground complex, classified by the government. There [PAWN_nameDef] and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} colleagues conduct experiments on humans and animals, studying genetics and conducting tests.

BackstoryDef.title: Radio host
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] broadcasts radio broadcasts to the war-ravaged population on behalf of the government.

BackstoryDef.title: Language teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the mother tongue to children at school.

BackstoryDef.title: Physics teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the physics to children at school.

BackstoryDef.title: Chemistry teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the chemistry to children at school.

BackstoryDef.title: Mathematic teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the mathematic to children at school.

BackstoryDef.title: Drawing teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the drawing to children at school.

BackstoryDef.title: Music teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] teaches the music to children at school.

BackstoryDef.title: Undertaker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] runs the funeral business, negotiating funeral procedures.

BackstoryDef.title: Forensic expert
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] monitors the veracity of the testimony of witnesses at trial, and also checks the evidence provided.

BackstoryDef.title: Judge
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] renders verdicts against the accused at trial, relying on the norms of the law of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} world.

BackstoryDef.title: Confectioner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves to cook various sweets, making a business out of it.

BackstoryDef.title: Aero engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs and builds air transport for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction.

BackstoryDef.title: Reconstructor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves everything related to history and is engaged in the reconstruction of life and battles of the past.

BackstoryDef.title: General
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] sits high in the army hierarchy, regularly developing military operations.

BackstoryDef.title: Captain
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] leads a warship, often taking part in military maneuvers and battles at sea.

BackstoryDef.title: Admiral
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] leads a battle squadron, leading battles in the seas and oceans.

BackstoryDef.title: War hero
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became a hero of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction, single-handedly deciding the outcome of a military battle.

BackstoryDef.title: War criminal
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has escaped prison many times, organizing terrorist attacks and military attacks in the name of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} religion.

BackstoryDef.title: Road paver
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works by building roads linking many settlements.

BackstoryDef.title: Terrorist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lost himself long ago, dissolving {PAWN_gender ? his : her} personality in pools of blood of innocent people.

BackstoryDef.title: Rebel
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been fighting the government of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} state for as long as {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can remember.

BackstoryDef.title: Anarchist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is waging a guerrilla war against the government as part of a small anarchist group.

BackstoryDef.title: Photographer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] usually has a low income, working as a photographer at children's parties and weddings.

BackstoryDef.title: Assassin
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a hitman in the medieval world, earning a reputation as a bloody man.

BackstoryDef.title: Rescuer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works in the rescue service, pulling people out of the rubble and avalanches.

BackstoryDef.title: Time traveler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is developing a time machine, but something goes wrong. [PAWN_nameDef] could not start it.

BackstoryDef.title: Lonely artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life alone, expressing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} pain in paintings.

BackstoryDef.title: Escaped slave
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life alone, expressing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} pain in paintings.

BackstoryDef.title: Artilleryman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the industrial army, firing artillery.

BackstoryDef.title: Gun-layer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] adjusted artillery fire during a heavy trench war.

BackstoryDef.title: Astronomer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies stars and planets, and also reveals the relationships in their movement.

BackstoryDef.title: Botanist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a certified botanist and is involved in plant breeding.

BackstoryDef.title: Nanotechnologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs microscopic robots for a variety of tasks.

BackstoryDef.title: Urban planner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs the construction of communications in new areas of the city.

BackstoryDef.title: Diplomat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of matters of peace and war on behalf of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} ruler.

BackstoryDef.title: Consul
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the head of the diplomatic department, which pursued policy on behalf of the state.

BackstoryDef.title: Ecologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked to protect the ecology of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} planet from growing industrial pollution.

BackstoryDef.title: Lawyer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in the legal defense of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} clients in court.

BackstoryDef.title: Forwarder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] often went on grueling hikes, visiting previously unknown places on the planet.

BackstoryDef.title: Immunologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies and treats diseases of the immune system in a private clinic in an urbanized world.

BackstoryDef.title: Bionic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs blueprints for bionic prostheses while working for a government clinic.

BackstoryDef.title: Film critic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s job was to analyze movies and criticize them.

BackstoryDef.title: DJ
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been making music for a long time and eventually becomes a club DJ.

BackstoryDef.title: Guide
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] leads excursions and provides entertainment for numerous foreigners.

BackstoryDef.title: Agrochemist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in biology and the development of new varieties of plants, through selection.

BackstoryDef.title: Taster
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tastes food and products before serving them to guests.

BackstoryDef.title: Sports doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a medical degree and is involved in the rehabilitation of athletes in the industrialized world.

BackstoryDef.title: Meteorologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies meteorites and rocks from other planets.

BackstoryDef.title: Linguist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies many languages ​​and speaks them fluently.

BackstoryDef.title: Analyst
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] does mathematics and mathematical analysis, making graphs and making predictions for various things.

BackstoryDef.title: Orthodontist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a dentist in a clinic in an urbanized world for most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life.

BackstoryDef.title: Advisor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the political advisor to the puppet leader.

BackstoryDef.title: Mechanic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a mechanic in a factory, repairing vehicles.

BackstoryDef.title: Pharmacist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a long time in a pharmacy, and then at a drug manufacturing plant.

BackstoryDef.title: Cultist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a priest of a cult-like cult.

BackstoryDef.title: Sectarian
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] falls into a brutal paramilitary sect, losing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} identity.

BackstoryDef.title: Conspirator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has experienced many power changes, weaving political intrigues.

BackstoryDef.title: Electronic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] creates electrical devices and microcircuits while working in a huge industrial plant.

BackstoryDef.title: Oilman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of the oil production at the enterprise.

BackstoryDef.title: Economist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] examines the economy of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} state, drawing up schedules and plans.

BackstoryDef.title: Dispatcher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] deals with the regulation of air traffic.

BackstoryDef.title: Banker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of the circulation of money in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} branch of the bank and is engaged in counting deposits.

BackstoryDef.title: Optician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] develops optical lenses for binoculars and spotting scopes.

BackstoryDef.title: Archivist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of the library fund of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} academy, studying and recounting it.

BackstoryDef.title: Antique dealer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] collects rare items, selling entire collections.

BackstoryDef.title: Drug dealer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in the criminal business as a drug dealer.

BackstoryDef.title: Mining engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs mines and underground bridges.

BackstoryDef.title: Regent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became regent with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} young son, but killed {PAWN_gender ? him : her} to seize power.

BackstoryDef.title: Emperor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] led a small empire scattered around the world, becoming a very formidable ruler.

BackstoryDef.title: King puppet
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had a weak character, becoming the de facto puppet of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} regent.

BackstoryDef.title: Privy counselor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a henchman of a foreign state, implicitly managing state affairs.

BackstoryDef.title: Commissioner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is responsible for maintaining discipline in the ranks of the army.

BackstoryDef.title: Autocrat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a cruel king, having reached the top of power over the heads of thousands of people.

BackstoryDef.title: Court gardener
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a long time as a gardener in the elite palace of the royal family.

BackstoryDef.title: Court designer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed luxury interiors at the royal castle.

BackstoryDef.title: Court confectioner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] makes cakes and other pastries of incredible beauty.

BackstoryDef.title: Court guard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] guards the Emperor's chambers at the cost of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own life.

BackstoryDef.title: Court doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a good medical background, working at the royal court.

BackstoryDef.title: Butler
BackstoryDef.description: For most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, [PAWN_nameDef] works at the court of titled persons, having earned himself an impeccable reputation.

BackstoryDef.title: Combat officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served during a terrible trench war that destroyed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} home, country and life.

BackstoryDef.title: Machine gunner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] went through several local conflicts, invariably defending {PAWN_gender ? his : her} positions with a machine gun.

BackstoryDef.title: Mountain shooter
BackstoryDef.description: In adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] found the beginning of the war, enrolling in a detachment of mountain riflemen defending the passes.

BackstoryDef.title: Tank commander
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] led a tank brigade during the war.

BackstoryDef.title: Winter sniper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the deadliest sniper during the Winter War.

BackstoryDef.title: Infantry commander
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] led a small detachment of infantry, conducting sabotage in the rear of the enemy faction.

BackstoryDef.title: Driller
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in well drilling for energy and ore exploration.

BackstoryDef.title: Geodesist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies surface and altitude for strategic purposes.

BackstoryDef.title: Molder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in casting molds for weapons and furniture.

BackstoryDef.title: Metallurgist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] researches metal alloys, creating new mixtures for a wide variety of purposes.

BackstoryDef.title: Metrologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] develops methods for measuring various physical quantities based on various instruments.

BackstoryDef.title: Installer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the installation and assembly of mechanical structures.

BackstoryDef.title: Service technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintains the equipment in working order and performs regular technical inspections.

BackstoryDef.title: Welder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a specialist in welding steel structures.

BackstoryDef.title: Locksmith
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] repairs complex mechanical and electrical equipment during breakdowns.

BackstoryDef.title: Woodworker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] makes objects from wood, sometimes amazing others with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} skill.

BackstoryDef.title: Thermist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the development of cooling and space heating systems.

BackstoryDef.title: Technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the chief engineer of large-scale production.

BackstoryDef.title: Turner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at the machine and makes metal and wood parts for construction.

BackstoryDef.title: Machiner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] creates gears and other parts for complex mechanisms on a machine tool.

BackstoryDef.title: Electrician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fixes electrical grids in the weapons industry.

BackstoryDef.title: Watchmaker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tunes mechanical watches and other small movements to order.

BackstoryDef.title: Rocketman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] controls the artillery combat system that protects the heavenly space.

BackstoryDef.title: Rock performer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performs music as part of a musical group.

BackstoryDef.title: Wandering musician
BackstoryDef.description: After the tragic death of the band members, [PAWN_nameDef] is left all alone.

BackstoryDef.title: Homeless
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been on the street for so long that it seems {PAWN_gender ? he : she} never had a home.

BackstoryDef.title: Giant of thought
BackstoryDef.description: The thoughts of [PAWN_nameDef] are so ingenious that words cannot describe it.

BackstoryDef.title: Gamer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been playing games for most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, immersed in another world.

BackstoryDef.title: Steamer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lives off donations from {PAWN_gender ? his : her} subscribers, not imagining himself without it.

BackstoryDef.title: Lazy student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enters a prestigious university, but prefers to party.

BackstoryDef.title: Medical student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies anatomy and dreams of healing people.

BackstoryDef.title: Student engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is studying the mechanics of war machines, hoping to build {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own artificial intelligence system.

BackstoryDef.title: Student teacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves working with children, so {PAWN_gender ? he : she} decides to enroll in teacher training college.

BackstoryDef.title: Student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studied at a higher academy, gaining extensive knowledge in the humanities.

BackstoryDef.title: Science writer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is very fond of science fiction, deciding to write {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own story, which did not resonate with the publisher.

BackstoryDef.title: Novelist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has extensive experience writing romance novels that regularly hit the top sellers.

BackstoryDef.title: Despot
BackstoryDef.description: Once [PAWN_nameDef] managed to seize power in a faction through a conspiracy. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} very tightly holds on to power, using all methods for this.

BackstoryDef.title: Revolutionary
BackstoryDef.description: Inspired by the ideas of the revolution, [PAWN_nameDef] participates in an illegal coup.

BackstoryDef.title: Invader
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of the assault army, whose tasks included war in the city.

BackstoryDef.title: Occupant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was garrisoned in the captured city, clearing out saboteurs and resistance units.

BackstoryDef.title: Revanchist
BackstoryDef.description: The [PAWN_nameDef] faction was crushed by the superior forces of the enemy, but [PAWN_nameDef] does not surrender and has been fighting a guerrilla war for many years.

BackstoryDef.title: Border guard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves at the border outpost, guarding faction territory from saboteur groups.

BackstoryDef.title: Outpost officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves at the border post as part of the officer corps, commanding security teams.

BackstoryDef.title: Resistance leader
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the leader of a banned faction that is trying to overthrow the tyrant from the throne of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction.

BackstoryDef.title: Cashier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves customers in the grocery chain of the urbanized world.

BackstoryDef.title: Secretary
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is responsible for reviewing and filtering complaints and documents before sending them to management.

BackstoryDef.title: Clergyman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the spiritual leader of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} village during the years of isolation.

BackstoryDef.title: Monk
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has lived {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life in an isolated fortress serving a religious cult.

BackstoryDef.title: Battle monk
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has lived all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life in the fortress, having managed to take part in its defense.

BackstoryDef.title: Paratrooper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was in the amphibious assault group for landing from orbit.

BackstoryDef.title: Historian
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] explores the rich history of the human race and its intricate experiences.

BackstoryDef.title: Fortress commandant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] oversees the defense of the fortress and instructs the militia.

BackstoryDef.title: Serf
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] работает на своего хозяина, является лично обязанным.

BackstoryDef.title: Boyarin
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is of noble origin, using its privileges.

BackstoryDef.title: Remote identity
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] doesn't remember anything about {PAWN_gender ? his : her} past. In fact, only a shell remained of him.

BackstoryDef.title: Exiled leader
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] The head of an exiled government with no real political power.

BackstoryDef.title: Exiled soldier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] A member of the exiled volunteer army hoping to restore legitimate authority.

BackstoryDef.title: Bomber
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a dangerous criminal and a failed suicide bomber. During the terrorist attack, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} explosive device did not work.

BackstoryDef.title: Deserter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] surrenders to a hostile military group and gives them strategic intelligence.

BackstoryDef.title: Shadow agent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] An undercover rebel agent who collects information and transmits it to the underground.

BackstoryDef.title: Secret gendarme
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] a seemingly unremarkable citizen who, however, is engaged in the search and neutralization of saboteurs.

BackstoryDef.title: Spaceship engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] Builds and designs spaceships for multiple crew members.

BackstoryDef.title: Bloody executioner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an executioner in a medieval world that has lost its last moral foundations.

BackstoryDef.title: Peacemaker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] Soldier in the Interfactional Army Peacekeeping Corps. The balance between them collapses, and their army remains on its own.

BackstoryDef.title: Coordinator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] coordinates resistance and intimidation.

BackstoryDef.title: Agitator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] secretly distributes leaflets and slogans of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} political group to overthrow the regime.

BackstoryDef.title: Theorist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] explores quantum physics and builds models of the universe.

BackstoryDef.title: Marauder
BackstoryDef.description: He trades in robbery and robbery. One day [PAWN_nameDef] is caught by a counterintelligence agent.

BackstoryDef.title: Fanatic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is fanatically loyal to {PAWN_gender ? his : her} spiritual leader through acts of retaliation and intimidation.

BackstoryDef.title: Nuclear scientist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] researches radioactive decay of atoms and designs nuclear power plants.

BackstoryDef.title: Victim
BackstoryDef.description: In {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth, [PAWN_nameDef] becomes the victim of a terrorist attack, which forever changed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} psyche.

BackstoryDef.title: Political prisoner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was held in harsh camps for political prisoners for a long time, having developed immunity to moral turmoil and acquired survival skills.

BackstoryDef.title: Navigator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] - the captain of a spaceship whose mission was to explore the nearest space.

BackstoryDef.title: Minister
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has held a high political office, successfully doing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} job.

BackstoryDef.title: Stormtrooper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] A member of the Assault Team of the Battle Force. Long years in the ranks have left their mark on the psyche.

BackstoryDef.title: Test pilot
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tested new flight and aeronautical facilities until one day it crashed on unknown land.

BackstoryDef.title: Kamikaze
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] desperate suicide pilot who was tasked with eliminating the enemy by air ramming. In fulfilling {PAWN_gender ? his : her} duty, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} miraculously remains alive.

BackstoryDef.title: Plate warrior
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] a soldier of the medieval army, dressed in sturdy full-body armor.

BackstoryDef.title: Rebel leader
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] The leader of an anarchist group that aims to eliminate the rightful leader of the faction.

BackstoryDef.title: Chairman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is in charge of a projectile industrial facility. Years in the profession led to the fact that {PAWN_gender ? he : she} studies the basics of military affairs.

BackstoryDef.title: Serial killer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] A ruthless psychopath who murdered {PAWN_gender ? his : her} family in cold blood.

BackstoryDef.title: Maniac
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a serial killer with an unpredictable disposition and thoughts.

BackstoryDef.title: Destroyer of planets
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] becomes a spaceship pilot carrying dangerous weapons capable of destroying an entire planet. Once {PAWN_gender ? he : she} applies it on the orders of the commander.

BackstoryDef.title: Editor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] edits and censors scientific journal articles.

BackstoryDef.title: Dancer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has dedicated {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life to dance and theater.

BackstoryDef.title: Dance teacher
BackstoryDef.description: FFF

BackstoryDef.title: Notary
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] authenticated documents in a small office in an urbanized world.

BackstoryDef.title: Publisher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] publishes magazines and newspapers with a small print shop.

BackstoryDef.title: School doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works in a school in the industrialized world, however, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} is usually difficult to find in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} workplace.

BackstoryDef.title: Captive soldier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured early in the war after being in a POW camp for several years.

BackstoryDef.title: Captive doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured early in the war after being in a POW camp for several years working as a POW medic.

BackstoryDef.title: Volunteer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] went to the front as a volunteer motivated by moral imperative.

BackstoryDef.title: Combat chef
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] prepares food for the mobile army at the front.

BackstoryDef.title: Combat doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] provides first aid to soldiers on the battlefield.

BackstoryDef.title: Zoologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studies animal behavior and physiology.

BackstoryDef.title: Guitar player
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] plays guitar with a traveling music group.

BackstoryDef.title: Field sapper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] Expert in building crossings and bridges for a marching army.

BackstoryDef.title: Minesweeper engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] disables mines and minefields for the army to pass.

BackstoryDef.title: Art critic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is well versed in art, criticizing and researching.

BackstoryDef.title: Undergrounder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] terrorist group agent underground.

BackstoryDef.title: Underground leader
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] leader of an underground terrorist organization.

BackstoryDef.title: Scientist traitor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fled to the enemy, taking with {PAWN_gender ? him : her} the secret development blueprints.

BackstoryDef.title: Debtor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working for a creditor most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, repaying an exorbitant debt.

BackstoryDef.title: Exorcist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performs rituals of cleansing and banishing evil spirits in the medieval world.

BackstoryDef.title: Professor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a broad knowledge of technical sciences while teaching at the university.

BackstoryDef.title: University rector
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] manages the university's operations, finances and curriculum.

BackstoryDef.title: Impostor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] described himself as a miraculously escaped monarch in an attempt to seize power.

BackstoryDef.title: Ship pilot
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] knows how to fly small spaceships.

BackstoryDef.title: Charlatan
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cheats money from people using dirty methods.

BackstoryDef.title: Jester
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] a clown in the medieval world, living at the court of the monarch.

BackstoryDef.title: Heretic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] renounced the official religious faith, condemning himself to persecution.

BackstoryDef.title: Preacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] distributed forbidden religious literature under persecution.

BackstoryDef.title: Influence agent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a privy councilor, effectively controlling the puppet king with the knowledge of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction.

BackstoryDef.title: Pimp
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has several slaves selling their sexual favors.

BackstoryDef.title: Jailer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works in the underground prison complex, keeping an eye on prisoners.

BackstoryDef.title: Plumber
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] repairs water supply and sanitation systems.

BackstoryDef.title: Military academician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designs military blueprints for the military academy researchers.

BackstoryDef.title: Primitiver
BackstoryDef.description: FFF

BackstoryDef.title: Chastener
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in the most brutal cleansing of the occupied cities from the rebels.

BackstoryDef.title: Military chemist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] creates chemical weapons for global warfare.

BackstoryDef.title: Loner pirate
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] robs small caravans passing by while staying in the shadows.

BackstoryDef.title: Pawn
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a simple performer, a pawn in the hands of a skilled manipulator.

BackstoryDef.title: Manipulator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] An unprincipled person who sets {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own goals at the head.
